body:
### distinct failure
The wallpaper selection interface in the Display Properties application (specifically the `WallpaperSelector` component) does not properly fill the bounding box of the window. There is excessive padding/spacing between the content (wallpaper grid, message, and buttons) and the outer frame, making the UI appear "too small" and disconnected from its container.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Open Display Properties (Right-click desktop -> Properties).
2. Go to the "Wallpaper" tab.
3. Observe the space between the wallpaper grid/buttons and the window border.

### Expected Behavior
The UI elements (grid, messages, and buttons) should be sized and positioned to more properly fill the bounding box within the application, ensuring a more integrated and professional look.

### Environment
- OS: Portfolio OS (Win95 Theme)
- Component: `components/win95/WallpaperSelector.tsx`
title: [Bug]: Wallpaper selection UI elements misaligned/undersized in Display Properties
